Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: containers for preparing food [300198758], culinary containers [300197577], containers by function or context [300197200], containers (receptacles) [300197197], Containers (hierarchy name) [300045611], Furnishings and Equipment (hierarchy name) [300264551], Objects Facet [300264092]

Non-Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: troughs (containers) [300220971], containers by form [300194507], containers (receptacles) [300197197], Containers (hierarchy name) [300045611], Furnishings and Equipment (hierarchy name) [300264551], Objects Facet [300264092]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Boxes or troughs, which may have lids, in which dough is mixed and kneaded.
Cajas o artesas, generalmente con una tapa, en las cuales la masa se mezcla y amasa.
Dozen of troggen, meestal met een deksel, waarin deeg wordt gemengd en gekneed.
可將麵團置於其中攪拌捏揉的箱盒或槽狀容器，通常附有蓋子。
Kasten oder Trog, gewöhnlich mit einem Deckel, in dem der Teig gemischt und geknetet wird.

Source.Source_ID: 2000106166/Nomenclature for Museum Cataloging / Nomenclature pour le catalogage translation project (2016-)
